title: agent runbook workspace for machine reports
summary: A build log for a filesystem workspace that routes agents through machine-reporting runbooks, evidence capture, reusable scripts, and report-to-PDF assembly without loading the whole system at once.
current_state: A build log for a filesystem workspace that routes agents through machine-reporting runbooks, evidence capture, reusable scripts, and report-to-PDF assembly without loading the whole system at once.

title: desktop certificate and audit PDF generator
summary: A build log for a Windows desktop tool that turns calibration, audit, and service-work models into previewable PDFs with templates, local job history, and repeatable numbering.
current_state: A build log for a Windows desktop tool that turns calibration, audit, and service-work models into previewable PDFs with templates, local job history, and repeatable numbering.

title: finished-batch packout report export
summary: A build log for a Windows-first reporting tool that turns finished production batches into packout PDFs and CSVs, with a ledger so exports are not repeated.
current_state: A build log for a Windows-first reporting tool that turns finished production batches into packout PDFs and CSVs, with a ledger so exports are not repeated.

title: machine capture to training dataset
summary: A build log for turning opaque multi-channel machine capture archives into decoded previews, annotations, and reproducible training dataset exports.
current_state: A build log for turning opaque multi-channel machine capture archives into decoded previews, annotations, and reproducible training dataset exports.

title: machine metrics collector with commissioning gates
summary: A build log for a Windows service and CLI that polls a machine API, writes time-series metrics, and refuses full ingestion until commissioning checks are satisfied.
current_state: A build log for a Windows service and CLI that polls a machine API, writes time-series metrics, and refuses full ingestion until commissioning checks are satisfied.

title: manual label printing from templates
summary: A build log for a Windows label-printing utility that turns bundled report templates, saved field values, presets, and layout nudges into repeatable manual print jobs.
current_state: A build log for a Windows label-printing utility that turns bundled report templates, saved field values, presets, and layout nudges into repeatable manual print jobs.

title: real-time anomaly detection on a grading line
summary: A one-night build that watches a multi-lane grading line and flags, in real time, when a lane's output mix drifts — using a contingency-table expected value and no training data.
current_state: A one-night build that watches a multi-lane grading line and flags, in real time, when a lane's output mix drifts — using a contingency-table expected value and no training data.

title: static archive scaffold
summary: A build log for turning a folder of records into a static archive with routes, metadata, and readable MDX pages.
current_state: The archive is still small, but it now has enough structure to behave like an archive instead of a pile of notes.

title: static report portal preview
summary: A build log for a static browser preview that demonstrates a report review-to-publish workflow without pretending local state is production security.
current_state: A build log for a static browser preview that demonstrates a report review-to-publish workflow without pretending local state is production security.

title: workbook row to packout PDF
summary: A build log for a Windows reporting bridge that turns formatted Excel workbooks and selected ledger rows into one-page operational PDFs.
current_state: A build log for a Windows reporting bridge that turns formatted Excel workbooks and selected ledger rows into one-page operational PDFs.
